perspectives.intro: I've been hearing things about the {subject_focus}. {rumor_detail}

exploratories.response: Nothing solid, mind you. But enough folk are talking that there must be something to it.

perspectives.intro: There's been talk about the {subject_focus} lately. {rumor_detail}

exploratories.response: The worried kind. People don't bring it up lightly.
Half the settlement, it feels like. Started with just a few, but it's spread.
Well, the short of it is that something's not right. People are uneasy, and I can't blame them.

perspectives.intro: The {subject_focus} has folk worried around here. {rumor_detail}

exploratories.response: Could be nothing. Could be something. That's what has everyone on edge: the not knowing.
I'd be a fool not to be, wouldn't I? But worrying doesn't fix anything.

perspectives.intro: Word around the settlement is that the {subject_focus} has become a problem. {rumor_detail}

exploratories.response: The kind that doesn't solve itself. Someone's going to have to deal with it sooner or later.

perspectives.intro: I don't usually put stock in rumors, but the {subject_focus}... that's different. {rumor_detail}

exploratories.response: Because the people telling me aren't the sort to make things up. Practical folk. Level-headed.
Changes. Small ones at first, but they're adding up. The kind of thing that makes you look twice.
Few weeks back, maybe longer. Hard to pin down exactly when folk started noticing.

perspectives.intro: If you've been anywhere near the {subject_focus}, you've probably noticed it yourself. {rumor_detail}

exploratories.prompt: I'm not sure what you mean.
exploratories.response: You will, if you spend any time there. It's the kind of thing you feel before you see.

questHookPerspectives.intro: The {subject_focus} has been on my mind. {rumor_detail} {quest_exposition}

decisive.prompt: I can take care of that.

questHookPerspectives.intro: Listen, the {subject_focus} is more than just idle talk. {quest_exposition}
I wasn't going to mention it, but since you're here: the {subject_focus} needs attention. {quest_exposition}

exploratories.response: If I could, I would. But it's beyond what I can manage alone. {quest_stakes_detail}

decisive.prompt: I'll see what I can do.

questHookPerspectives.intro: The {subject_focus} has been trouble for a while now, and it's only getting worse. {rumor_detail} {quest_exposition}

decisive.prompt: Point me toward it. I'll handle the rest.
